name: Fat Mono
explanation: A fat monophonic analog-style synthesizer: three detuned oscillators (two saws + a pulse) summed thick and driven through a 4-pole resonant transistor-ladder low-pass with tanh saturation in the feedback loop. A dedicated filter envelope sweeps the cutoff on every note, with a separate amplitude envelope plus portamento glide for expressive, last-note-priority lead and bass tones.
